title: Pampers Harmonie Aqua Baby Wipes Plastic Free 24 Packs of 48 Wipes, 1152 Baby Wet Wipes, Help restore natural skin pH, Delicate lotion with 99 percent water
features: Gentler than cotton wool and water
Unique formula that helps restore natural skin pH and protect against irritation
Made with 0% alcohol, perfume or dyes
Suitable for extra delicate newborn skin
Approved by Skin Health Alliance dermatologists
Remember to bin your wipes and not to flush them
description: Product Description Gentle care and protection for your baby's precious skin - delicate lotion with 99% water. Pampers Harmonie Aqua plastic free baby wipes are gentler than just cotton wool & water. Dirty nappies raise skin pH and can cause irritation. Thanks to their special formula, gentle skin cleansers and protectors, Pampers Harmonie Aqua plastic free baby wipes help restore natural skin pH. They are made with 0% alcohol or perfume. The formula is dermatologically tested. It is approved by Skin Health Alliance dermatologists. Remember to bin your wipes and not to flush them. Ingredients Aqua, Citric Acid, Sodium Citrate, Sodium Benzoate, PEG-40 Hydrogenated Castor Oil, Sorbitan Caprylate, Disodium EDTA Directions Open the package and gently take out a wipe for cleaning your baby's delicate skin Safety Warning Avoid contact with eyes. Test on a small area before use. Discontinue use if skin irritation occurs. Dispose of used wipes properly; do not flush. Manufacturer Contact Information Procter & Gamble UK, Weybridge, Surrey, KT13 0XP See more
